The fifth '''planet''' of the [[Pii system/Legends|Pii system]] was a barren terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with no interest. The planet [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Pii sun|sun]] between [[Pii IV]] and the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] [[Pii system's second asteroid field|second asteroid field]]. It was located in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]]<ref name="Greel" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Atlas" /> Like the rest of the Pii system, the planet was a seven-[[Standard day/Legends|day]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] journey away from the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]<ref name="Greel" /> and along the [[Old Corellian Run]] and the [[Trans Gulf Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]].<ref name="Atlas" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Pii system's fifth planet was mentioned in "[[The Greel Wood Haven]]," an article written by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]] and featured in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6|sixth]] issue of ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] magazine that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[May]] of [[1995]].<ref name="Greel" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Pii system, and therefore the planet itself, in grid square R-16.<ref name="Atlas" />
